context.issue: Wallet / cash accounting is WRONG: cash_sol does not match real wallet SOL.
context.cursor_role: Cursor creates task definitions only. Claude executes one task at a time and writes docs/workflow/claude_task_result.json per task. No parallel work.

strict_rules: NO parallel work — tasks run in order T-003 → T-008.
ONE task at a time — do not start T-00(n+1) until T-00n is committed and validated.
DO NOT invent new architecture beyond what each task specifies.
DO NOT touch unrelated systems (stay in listed scope).
ALWAYS pass required_validation before moving on.
Each task handoff MUST use docs/workflow/claude_task_result.json with status=ready_for_cursor_validation when ready for Cursor gate.

claude_handoff_template.description: When a task is complete, Claude MUST write docs/workflow/claude_task_result.json with at least:

tasks.title: Wallet vs State Reconciliation Audit
tasks.goal: Prove where cash_sol diverges from real wallet SOL.
constraints: NO code changes in this task — audit and documentation of flow only.
output_claude_must_produce: Exact flow diagram or narrative: wallet → state → cash_sol (every step).
List of concrete mismatch points (where divergence can occur).
Written artifact suitable for docs/ or workflow (path to be set in claude_task_result.json).
NO production code edits.
suggested_validation: Optional: static review only; pytest N/A if no code. Gate may use --no-commit or minimal checks per Claude's claude_task_result.json.

tasks.title: Source of Truth Definition
tasks.goal: Decide the ONLY source of truth for cash / wallet balance (RPC wallet vs internal state vs hybrid).
constraints: Choose ONE primary source of truth.
Justify the choice against trading safety and observability.
output_claude_must_produce: Clear spec: single authoritative definition.
Invariant rules (bullet or numbered).
Explicit rejection of ambiguous hybrid unless justified as layered (if hybrid, define which field is authoritative when).
NO implementation code yet.
suggested_validation: Review-only or doc lint; no code tests required unless docs are validated by a script.

tasks.title: Fix cash_sol computation
tasks.goal: Align system accounting with the source of truth chosen in T-004.
constraints: NO breaking existing tests without updating them.
Update tests if behavior contract changes.
output_claude_must_produce: Code changes implementing T-004 spec.
Updated or new tests as needed.
Short explanation of what changed and why (in commit message and/or summary).
suggested_validation: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/ (or targeted paths per change)
Include tests touching trader, portfolio, capacity if applicable.

tasks.title: Add reconciliation check (doctor)
tasks.goal: Detect drift between wallet SOL and computed cash_sol automatically in doctor.
constraints: Add doctor check: wallet_sol vs computed cash_sol.
Threshold-based alert (configurable or constant per project conventions).
output_claude_must_produce: New doctor check with clear pass/fail semantics.
Log format documented (structured or tagged for grep).
Test covering the check (unit or integration as appropriate).

tasks.title: Add runtime guard (CRITICAL)
tasks.goal: PREVENT trading when drift exceeds threshold; still allow exits.
constraints: If drift > threshold: block NEW entries only.
Allow exits (sells, risk reductions) to continue per existing rules.
output_claude_must_produce: Guard in trader (or run) loop with clear condition.
Observable event or log tag for SELL_BLOCKED / ENTRY_BLOCKED style audit (match project patterns).
Tests or simulation path proving block-entry / allow-exit.
suggested_validation: doctor still passes when drift in range

tasks.title: Observability improvement
tasks.goal: Make debugging trivial: log wallet_sol, cash_sol, drift each cycle.
scope: Logging in cycle summary / trader path
Avoid leaking secrets; wallet addresses per existing policy
constraints: Per-cycle visibility without drowning logs (level INFO or DEBUG per convention).
output_claude_must_produce: Logs: wallet_sol, cash_sol, drift (and units clear).
Documentation of fields in one place (comment or short doc).
Tests if log output is asserted; otherwise manual verification steps in summary.
suggested_validation: Smoke: one dry run or unit capturing log lines

execution_note: Claude works T-003 first. After each task: write docs/workflow/claude_task_result.json → Cursor runs tools/cursor_validation_gate.py. Only after pass+commit does Claude proceed to the next task_id. STOP after creating this file; do not execute tasks in Cursor.
